stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP file 3.7.
Given the following information, determine the time required by a multi-engined piston aeroplane to climb to 2400 ft, assuming that the rate of climb is constant throughout the climb and equals to a rate of climb to 6000 ft pressure altitude:

2-engines operating at maximum continuous power.
Gear retracted
OAT: +17ºC
Pressure altitude: 6000 ft
Take-off Mass: 4000 Ib
